title: Deducing `this` in C++23 — A Complete Guide
author: Ankur Satle
excerpt: C++23's deducing this finally eliminates the need for CRTP in many patterns. Here's how it works and when to use it.

title: Ranges in C++20: A Practical Introduction
author: Karan Banthia
excerpt: std::ranges transforms the way we write algorithms. This guide walks through filter, transform, and custom views with real examples.

title: Trip Report: CppCon 2024
author: Jayshree Ambekar
excerpt: A first-hand account of CppCon 2024 — highlights, key talks, hallway conversations, and what the C++ community is excited about.

title: C++20 Coroutines: From Zero to Generator
author: Sandesh Chitguppe
excerpt: Coroutines are the most complex C++20 feature. This post builds intuition from first principles and shows how to write a reusable generator.

title: Modern CMake: Stop Writing Terrible Build Files
author: Ankur Satle
excerpt: A guide to target-based CMake — why you should never use include_directories() again and how to structure projects that actually work.

title: Memory Safety in C++ — The 2025 State of Affairs
author: Karan Banthia
excerpt: With Rust's rise and the White House memo, memory safety is the hottest topic in C++. Here's where we actually stand.
